name: Summoned books auto-equip and can be moved between slots
description: A summon fills the first empty equip slot; tapping the slotted book then another empty slot moves it.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game with the URL path /?fresh=1 (this starts a brand-new save) and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
Verify the first equip slot now shows a book with a level badge (like Lv1) — summons auto-equip into empty slots
Tap the book in the first equip slot to select it, then tap a different empty equip slot
Verify the book moved: the tapped destination slot now shows the book and the original slot is empty again
